tags: area 51|roswell incident|roswell|ufo|project mogul|arctic world archive|global seed vault
description:
Hello friends!

Today we are diving into the world of forbidden places. I started this video thinking it was going to be a simple, fun video on Area 51 but the more I learned about it, the more invested I got. How the development of the 'Dragon Lady' Lockheed U2 Spy Plane, led to the formation of the Top Secret Nevada Test Site, now known as Area 51. How Project Mogul, and balloons built to spy on Soviet Nuclear Tests ended up causing one of the most famous UFO Scandals in American history. And how the development of Nuclear weapons led to post-apocalyptic contingency plans.

It's my longest video yet on this channel! I really hope you guys enjoy it.

The wait for the next one will be shorter (I promise)!

title: The Future is African
description:
One of my first viral videos on Tiktoks was a video I did on how 'The future would be African', for a number of different reasons. From the fact that while the rest of the world is struggling to produce enough children to naturally replace their population - the majority of African countries have the highest birthrate in the world. 

The original TikTok video sparked a number of conversations as to why or why not African countries like Nigeria, Kenya, South Africa, etc might emerge as world powers by the end of the century. There were a number of comments related to life expectancy, government, infrastructure, education, and I tired to touch on as many as I could in this video. 

Let me know what you think!

title: What's up with the Multiverse?
tags: multiverse|multiversus|doctor strange|spiderman|everything everywhere all at once|deja vu|multiverse of madness|many worlds|parallel universe|multiverse theory
description:
Been seeing a lot of Multiverse movies recently. From Spiderman: No Way Home, to Doctor Strange: Multiverse of Madness, to Everything Everywhere All At Once, and Games like Multiversus. 

But humans have thought of the Multiverse for thousands of years, going as far back to the Stoics and Atomists. Edgar Allen Poe wrote a poem about Parallel Universes.

This video explores the rise in Multiverse stories, the levels of the Multiverse, things like the Mandela  Effect, and the Butterfly Effect, and how the Multiverse ties in.

The Fourth Industrial Revolution
description:
Made this video on the technologies that are shaping the fourth industrial revolution. From the Internet of Things and Smart Devices (smart phone, smart homes, smart lights), and the artificial intelligence that powers them. Tesla and other autonomous cars. title: CRYPTO VS DOTCOM BUBBLE

description:
Video comparing the dot com bubble of the late 1990s and the crypto bubble of the early 2020s. In the late 1990s the NASDAQ grew over 500% in a few short years mainly driven by internet based stocks like Amazon, Google, Apple, Pets.com, and many more. 

Lots of money was being made as investors threw their money into the market before it all eventually crashed. 

Similarly in the early 2020s, there was a bull market for crypotcurrency. Where we saw similar patterns of investing behaviour.
